trivia_bullets.text: Portcullis Vine originated in Guilds of Ravnica (October 2018, set GRN 142), the first of two sets revisiting the plane of Ravnica. In that set's limited environment, it was a building block for defender-based draft strategies — early community discussion on MTGSalvation described it as "gold for the Wall.dec" in the context of Guilds of Ravnica Pauper [MTGSalvation: Guilds of Ravnica commons for Pauper forum thread, via WebSearch].

Flavor text: "Nature's way of saying 'take the long way home.'" The same text appeared on both the Guilds of Ravnica original printing and the Core Set 2021 reprint — the only two printings of this card to date [Scryfall: GRN/142; Scryfall: M21/195].

EDHREC rank 14564 (as of 2026-05-19). Portcullis Vine is Pauper-legal and PauperCommander-legal. Its sacrifice ability — {2}, {T}, sacrifice a creature with defender: draw a card — lets it convert a board of defender-only creatures into card draw, giving Wall tribal and defender-matters strategies a built-in outlet [Scryfall oracle text].

As a 0/3 Creature — Plant Wall for {G} with Defender, Portcullis Vine is a one-mana blocker that trades zero offensive capability for a sacrifice-draw engine. The Plant subtype connects it to Plant-tribal synergies (Avenger of Zendikar, Quirion Ranger) but its primary function in Constructed is enabling the defender-synergy axis alongside cards like Assault Formation and Arcades, the Strategist [Scryfall].

related_cards.name: Portcullis Vine
related_cards.note: Original printing — identical art (James Paick) and flavor text

related_cards.name: Arcades, the Strategist
related_cards.note: Defender-matters commander that rewards including 0-power walls; Portcullis Vine slots directly into Arcades builds

related_cards.name: Assault Formation
related_cards.note: Enchantment that lets defenders attack using toughness; key enabler alongside Portcullis Vine in Wall strategies

related_cards.name: Wall of Blossoms
related_cards.note: Design predecessor — green wall with ETB draw; Portcullis Vine's sacrifice-draw is the activated-ability variant of the same role
